EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IRasterTypeProperties

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control raster type properties.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("078C7800-66F2-46CF-A182-78E6C4AADE53")]
public interface IRasterTypeProperties

Properties

AddRastersParameters

The parameters controlling how rasters are added using this raster type.

IAddRastersParameters AddRastersParameters { get; set; }

Property Value

IAddRastersParameters

Examples

Sample Snippet

DataSourceFilter

Regular expression formed using wild card characters ('*', '?', or '.') for matching data source items requested for URI constructions. No item URIs are created for input that doesn't match the specified regular expression.

string DataSourceFilter { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Description

Description of the raster type.

string Description { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

EnableClipToFootprint

Indicates whether datasets are clipped to their footprints.

bool EnableClipToFootprint { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

FirstAddTimeStamp

The time when this raster type was first used for adding rasters to the mosaic dataset. The value in this property also appears in the moasic dataset's raster type table.

DateTime FirstAddTimeStamp { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTime

Examples

Sample Snippet

InputDataSourceTypes

The types of input data source types as a bitwise combination of esriCrawlerDataSourceType values.

int InputDataSourceTypes { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

LastAddTimeStamp

The time when this raster type was last used for adding rasters to the mosaic dataset. The value in this property also appears in the moasic dataset's raster type table.

DateTime LastAddTimeStamp { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTime

Examples

Sample Snippet

LastSyncTimeStamp

The time when this raster type was last used for synchronizing one or more rasters in the mosaic dataset. The value in this property also appears in the moasic dataset's raster type table.

DateTime LastSyncTimeStamp { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTime

Examples

Sample Snippet

Name

Name of the raster type.

string Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

OperationDescription

A user-identifiable description of the collection of items added by this raster type instance.

string OperationDescription { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

OrthorectificationParameters

The parameters controlling orthorectification of raster datasets built by this raster type.

IGeometricFunctionArguments OrthorectificationParameters { get; set; }

Property Value

IGeometricFunctionArguments

Examples

Sample Snippet

SupportedURIFilters

Default URI filters supported by the raster type.

IArray SupportedURIFilters { get; set; }

Property Value

IArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

SupportsOrthorectification

Indicates whether the raster type supports orthorectification.

bool SupportsOrthorectification { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

SupportsSeamline

Indicates whether the raster type supports seamline.

bool SupportsSeamline { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

SupportsStereo

Indicates whether the raster type supports stereo.

bool SupportsStereo { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

SynchronizeParameters

The parameters controlling how rasters are synchronized using this raster type instance.

ISynchronizeParameters SynchronizeParameters { get; set; }

Property Value

ISynchronizeParameters
